---
id: get-server-info
title: "Get the server version and app update-gating info"
description: "Public. Lets clients display which server version they're connected to, and lets a mobile client show a blocking 'update required' screen when its own build is older than `minAppVersion`."
sidebar_label: "Get the server version and app update-gating info"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: developers/api-reference/famlin-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the server version and app update-gating info"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/auth/server-info"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Public. Lets clients display which server version they're connected to, and lets a mobile client show a blocking "update required" screen when its own build is older than `minAppVersion`.

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-server-info.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
